title: Build control-tower TUI status widget and dashboard
description: Create the Pi-native UX that makes this cooler than generic subagents. Use ctx.ui.setStatus/setWidget for always-on wave progress and ctx.ui.custom overlay for /ticks-dashboard. Show wave timeline, agent cards, current tool/action, worktree/branch, verification lane, merge queue, cost/context telemetry, and human gates. Keep non-TUI mode useful with textual summaries.
acceptance_criteria: /ticks-dashboard opens an interactive overlay in TUI mode and /ticks-dashboard --dump prints the same run model in text. Live/fixture data shows wave progress, agent cards, verifier/merge lanes, cost/context numbers, and recovery/human-gate sections. Component render tests or snapshot-style tests cover narrow/wide terminal widths.
closed_reason: Completed: added shared dashboard model, responsive control-tower overlay, compact live widget/status, dump rendering, wave/agent/verification/merge/recovery/gate lanes, telemetry, demo fixtures, and narrow/wide render tests.
